mapper.select:
select m.learn_id, m.learn_theme, m.required_duration, m.learn_start, m.learn_end, m.create_time, m.update_time from t_env_learn m
and exists ( select 1 from sys_user_ent ue, t_env_learn_ent le where ue.user_id = #{userId} and le.ent_code = ue.ent_code and le.learn_id = m.learn_id )
and exists ( select 1 from t_env_learn_user u where u.learn_id = m.learn_id and u.user_id = #{userId} )
and exists ( select 1 from t_env_learn_policy p, t_env_policy_regulation r where m.learn_id = p.learn_id and r.policy_id = p.policy_id and r.policy_name like concat('%', #{policyName}, '%') )
and m.learn_theme like concat('%', #{learnTheme}, '%')
order by m.learn_id desc

select lp.learn_id as learnId, lp.policy_id as policyId, pr.policy_name as policyName from t_env_learn_policy lp left join t_env_policy_regulation pr on pr.policy_id = lp.policy_id where lp.learn_id in
#{learnId}

select le.learn_id as learnId, le.ent_code as entCode, e.ent_name as entName from t_env_learn_ent le left join t_bas_enterprise e on e.ent_code = le.ent_code where le.learn_id in
#{learnId}

select lu.learn_user_id as learnUserId, lu.learn_id as learnId, lu.user_id as userId, u.user_name as userName, lu.completed_duration as completedDuration from t_env_learn_user lu left join sys_user u on u.user_id = lu.user_id where lu.learn_id in
#{learnId}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_env_learn
learn_id, learn_theme, required_duration, learn_start, learn_end,
#{learnId}, #{learnTheme}, #{requiredDuration}, #{learnStart}, #{learnEnd},

insert into t_env_learn_user (learn_user_id, learn_id, user_id, completed_duration) values
(#{item.learnUserId}, #{item.learnId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.completedDuration})
mapper.select: select c.learn_user_id as learnUserId, c.user_id as userId, u.user_name as userName, l.required_duration as requiredDuration, c.completed_duration as completedDuration from t_env_learn_user c left join t_env_learn l on l.learn_id = c.learn_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = c.user_id where c.learn_id = #{learnId} order by c.learn_user_id desc

select d.learn_detail_id as learnDetailId, d.learn_start as learnStart, d.learn_end as learnEnd, d.duration, a.annex_id as annexId, a.file_name as fileName from t_env_learn_detail d left join t_data_annex a on a.annex_id = d.annex_id where learn_user_id = #{learnUserId} and duration > 0 order by learn_detail_id desc
select c.learn_user_id as learnUserId, c.user_id as userId, c.completed_duration as completedDuration from t_env_learn_user c where c.learn_user_id = #{learnUserId}

choose.when: insert into t_env_learn_detail (learn_detail_id, learn_user_id, annex_id, learn_start, learn_end, duration) values (#{learnDetailId}, #{learnUserId}, #{annexId}, #{learnDate}, #{learnDate}, 0)

mapper.select: select count(*) from t_env_learn_policy where policy_id = #{policyId}
